def positive_repeated_dict_get_same_key_no_cache():
    rule_id = "repeated_dict_get_same_key_no_cache"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "The same dictionary key is fetched repeatedly instead of storing the value in a local binding."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
